extractionMethod: Chrome logged-in UI with direct macOS Accessibility: pressed each selected template's Use Template button, then read the loaded generation form.
selectionGoal: 20 most unique/useful image presets for ad creation from the inspected Genviral template catalog.
selectionNotes: Shortlist favors distinct ad formats over near-duplicate variants: lifestyle UGC, food/recipe, product/spec infographics, fashion guides, hiring, local service flyers, beauty product photography, SaaS OG images, product comparison, and thumbnail hook creative.
Only one hiring variant was selected because many hiring cards share the same underlying structure.
All prompts in this file were captured after loading the template into the Genviral form, not copied from card previews.
notes: Chrome page JavaScript from Apple Events was unavailable, so templates were loaded and read through the logged-in UI instead of exporting React state directly.
The page was on the Image tab while these presets were captured.

presets.name: Ceramics Landing Page
presets.prompt:
Horizontal desktop landing page hero section for a fictional playful homeware store called "kiln & co." (placeholder). Minimalist editorial layout combined with whimsical character-driven ceramic product renders on a warm pink background. Oversized lowercase wordmark, refined e-commerce structure, joyful-but-premium mood.
Canvas: Full-width horizontal 16:9 desktop composition. Soft warm blush-pink background (#F5D6CC) with subtle paper grain.
Top navigation:
Far left: Small minimalist glyph of two overlapping outlined circles in charcoal.
Center-left: Three nav links in small medium-weight sans-serif: "Collection · Story · Stockists".
Far right: Small circular account icon and shopping bag icon with "(0)".
Massive hero wordmark (dominant, spanning ~95% width, centered): Lowercase "ceramics" in bold modern sans-serif (like Aeonik Bold or Söhne Bold), deep charcoal (#1A1A1A). Tight tracking, clean and confident.
Floating 3D character mug renders (5 playful ceramic mugs with expressive painted faces, arranged diagonally from upper-right to lower-left, overlapping the wordmark):
Each mug is a hand-thrown stoneware vessel with a painted illustrated character face on the front — rendered in a folk-art / naive illustration style (not anime, not chibi, more like 1970s Scandinavian children's book illustration meets Eastern European folk ceramics). Characters are charming, slightly irregular, hand-painted with visible brushstroke texture. Each has a different emotion and color palette:
Top-right — The Curious One: A round mug in warm terracotta-orange glaze with a painted face showing raised eyebrows and a small "o"-shaped mouth. Eyes drawn as simple almond shapes looking upward, as if asking a question. Two small tulip-like flower accents painted on the rim in yellow and green. Tilted at 35°.
Upper-middle — The Sleepy One: A taller mug in soft sage-green glaze with a painted face showing closed-eye crescents (suggesting a gentle sleep or contentment), a small peaceful smile. A tiny painted moon symbol on the cheek. Rosy dot-cheeks hand-painted on. Drifting down-left.
Center-middle — The Mischievous One: A larger mug in deep cobalt-blue glaze with a painted face showing one winking eye and a small crooked grin. A tiny painted star floating next to the eye. Hand-drawn eyebrow tilted playfully. Most prominent in the composition, rotated to show the handle clearly.
Lower-middle — The Shy One: A medium mug in dusty-pink glaze with a painted face showing soft looking-down eyes (long lashes visible), a gentle bashful smile, heavy rosy blushes on both cheeks. A small hand-painted heart on the side of the mug. Tilted sideways.
Lower-left — The Confident One: A smaller mug in creamy butter-yellow glaze with a painted face showing bold big eyes looking straight ahead, a wide smile with visible teeth, eyebrows raised in a confident lift. A small painted crown detail above the face. Floating at the lowest position, almost horizontal.
All characters share a consistent illustration style — simple hand-painted linework with a slightly rustic feel, subtle color variations in the paint, visible ceramic texture showing through the glaze. The faces feel like they're painted by the same artist. Cute but not childish — the quality suggests "artisan studio" rather than "novelty store."
Objects float in space with soft cast shadows beneath, as if gently levitating. Photorealistic 3D rendering with soft studio lighting from upper-left, authentic glazed ceramic material behavior, fine brushwork visible on painted details.
Left content column (lower-left, below the "c" of "ceramics"):
Top: Price in bold medium-weight sans-serif: "from $42".
Middle: Three-line description in warm muted brown-grey: "A small family of mugs, each with their own mood. Because mornings are different, and your cup should understand."
Bottom: Pill-shaped outlined button: "Meet the collection →".
Bottom-right: "01 / 08" pagination and "mood collection — fall 2026" in tracked uppercase.
Bottom strip:
Left: "free shipping over $120 · 30-day returns"


Center: "kiln & co. — homeware atelier since 2022"
Palette: soft blush-pink background (#F5D6CC), deep charcoal typography (#1A1A1A), terracotta-orange, sage-green, cobalt-blue, dusty-pink, butter-yellow (the five mug glazes), warm muted brown-grey body text (#6B5A52). Typography: bold modern sans-serif for wordmark, medium sans for body, small tracked uppercase for meta. Mood: joyful, emotionally playful, folk-art illustrated, artisan-but-polished, character-driven premium homeware. Not anime-kawaii, not chibi — more scandinavian children's book illustration meets eastern european folk pottery. Awwwards / Dribbble quality landing page, 4k.
presets.adUseReason: E-commerce landing-page creative with product renders and offer copy.

presets.name: Espresso Drink Guide
presets.prompt: Elegant coffee infographic showing 12 classic espresso-based drinks arranged in a 4x3 grid on a rich dark roasted-bean brown background. Each drink is displayed as a transparent glass cup cross-section revealing distinct colored layers — dark espresso at the bottom, steamed milk in creamy white, foam as airy cloud-like caps, chocolate syrup in deep brown, vanilla in pale gold. Drinks include: Espresso, Doppio, Ristretto, Americano, Long Black, Macchiato, Cortado, Flat White, Cappuccino, Latte, Mocha, Affogato. Each glass has a clean label underneath in modern sans-serif typography with the drink name and a one-line ratio description (e.g. "1:1 espresso to steamed milk"). A large decorative title at the top reads "THE ESPRESSO GUIDE" in elegant serif letterpress style with a subtle coffee bean illustration. Warm ambient lighting with soft shadows under each glass, slight condensation on cold drinks, wisps of steam rising from hot drinks. Bottom bar shows a roast-level gradient strip from light to dark with bean icons. Clean editorial layout, premium café poster aesthetic, photorealistic glass rendering with illustrated diagram overlay.
presets.adUseReason: Food and beverage education poster that can sell menu variety.

presets.name: Rooftop Bar Evening
presets.prompt: She perches on a high stool at an open-air rooftop bar, the city skyline twinkling behind her in soft bokeh lights. A sleek black silk camisole is tucked into high-waisted tailored cream trousers, paired with minimalist black strappy heels. A cropped black leather jacket hangs on the back of her stool. Her dark hair is in loose waves, catching the warm glow of a hanging Edison bulb overhead. One hand wraps around a coupe glass of champagne, the other rests on the brushed-concrete bar surface near a small ceramic bowl of marinated olives. The rooftop is styled with terracotta planters, woven lanterns, and low wooden furniture. The sky behind transitions from deep navy to warm amber at the horizon. Natural iPhone night mode grain adds texture, the warm artificial lighting creating flattering skin tones against the cool evening sky—rooftop bar evening, shot on iPhone
presets.adUseReason: Lifestyle hospitality scene for nightlife, fashion, and venue ads.

presets.name: Autumn Park Bench
presets.prompt: A candid iPhone photo of a young woman curled up on a weathered wooden park bench beneath a canopy of peak-autumn maple trees. She wraps both hands around a large takeaway oat milk latte, wearing a chunky rust-orange cable-knit scarf wound loosely several times around her neck, a fitted dark green corduroy jacket with brass snap buttons, and straight-leg black jeans tucked into caramel suede ankle boots. A hardcover novel lies face-down on the bench beside her, pages ruffled by a light breeze that also stirs fallen leaves in amber, crimson, and gold scattered across the gravel path. Her light brown hair is down, slightly windswept, catching individual strands in the filtered golden light penetrating the leaf canopy. The scene is quiet—a few blurred figures walking dogs in the distance, the path curving away into a tunnel of color. Shot from a standing position a few steps away, the composition frames her and the bench within the natural arch of overhanging branches—autumn park pause, shot on iPhone
presets.adUseReason: Seasonal lifestyle UGC-style scene for apparel, cafes, and books.

presets.name: Hotel Lobby Grand Mirror
presets.prompt: She catches her reflection in a massive gilded mirror in a grand hotel lobby, phone raised to chest height with deliberate poise. A floor-length emerald green satin slip dress skims her frame, paired with strappy black heeled sandals and a tiny black satin clutch held under one arm. Her hair is swept into a polished low chignon, small diamond stud earrings visible. The lobby behind her reflects crystal chandeliers, marble columns, and plush velvet seating in deep burgundy. The mirror's ornate gold frame fills most of the shot, its baroque scrollwork creating a dramatic border. Warm chandelier light mixes with cool marble reflections, casting her in a cinematic glow. The phone screen is faintly visible in the mirror, adding an authentic self-portrait layer—grand hotel mirror moment, shot on iPhone
presets.adUseReason: Luxury fashion/hospitality mirror-selfie scene with premium styling.

presets.name: 5 Step Korean Skincare Routine
presets.prompt: A clean, editorial skincare infographic showing a 5-step Korean skincare routine arranged in numbered vertical panels on a soft blush marble surface. Step 1: oil cleanser in a frosted glass pump bottle. Step 2: foaming cleanser squeezed onto fingertips with a creamy texture. Step 3: toner patted onto skin with a cotton pad. Step 4: serum in a glass dropper bottle with a single golden drop at the tip. Step 5: moisturizer in a ceramic jar with a dewy finish swatch beside it. Each step has clean typography with the product type and a "wait 30s" timing note. The products are minimal and elegant — white, blush, and glass. Soft diffused light from above, no harsh shadows. Title reads "GLASS SKIN ROUTINE" in delicate serif font — skincare routine infographic, K-beauty guide
presets.adUseReason: Beauty routine explainer for skincare product funnels.

presets.name: Solar System Scale Map
presets.prompt: Stunning retro-scientific solar system infographic on a deep navy-black space background with subtle star field. Horizontal layout showing all 8 planets arranged left to right from Mercury to Neptune at approximately correct relative sizes (Jupiter and Saturn dramatically larger than the inner rocky planets). The Sun is partially visible as a massive glowing arc on the far left edge, radiating warm golden light and corona wisps. Each planet is rendered in beautiful detail — Mercury (gray, cratered), Venus (pale yellow cloud bands), Earth (blue oceans, green continents, white clouds), Mars (rusty red with ice caps), Jupiter (swirling orange-brown storm bands with the Great Red Spot), Saturn (golden with crisp ring system casting shadow), Uranus (pale cyan, tilted), Neptune (deep vivid blue). Below each planet, a clean data card with: planet name in bold retro-futurist typography, diameter in km, distance from sun in AU, number of moons, average surface temperature, and a 1-5 dot scale for atmosphere density. Thin orbital path lines arc across the background connecting each planet. An asteroid belt is depicted as a scattered band of small rocky fragments between Mars and Jupiter. A logarithmic distance scale bar runs along the bottom edge. Title centered at top: "THE SOLAR SYSTEM" in wide-tracked vintage space-age lettering with a retro-futurist decorative underline. Color palette: deep space navy, warm planetary golds and oranges, cool icy blues, crisp white text. Mid-century scientific illustration meets modern data visualization aesthetic.
presets.adUseReason: High-information infographic style useful for education/product explainer ads.

presets.name: West Village Stoop
presets.prompt: A young woman sits on the brownstone stoop of a classic West Village townhouse, legs stretched down the stone steps, leaning back on her palms. She wears a fitted chocolate brown leather jacket zipped halfway over a cream cashmere crewneck, vintage Levi's 501s with a natural fade, and pointed black ankle boots with a modest heel. Thin gold hoop earrings and a vintage men's watch complete the look. Her dark hair is center-parted and freshly washed, falling in a glossy curtain. The brownstone facade shows aged red brick, a black lacquered front door with brass hardware, and a window box overflowing with trailing ivy. Fallen autumn leaves in russet and gold scatter the steps and sidewalk. The soft late-autumn light is warm but low, casting long shadows from the iron stoop railing. Shot from the sidewalk at eye level, the framing places her off-center with the full brownstone facade providing architectural context—West Village afternoon, shot on iPhone
presets.adUseReason: Urban fashion lifestyle shot with strong local/editorial feel.

presets.name: Brooklyn Bodega Run
presets.prompt: A candid iPhone snap of a young woman stepping out of a corner bodega on a Brooklyn side street, a brown paper bag cradled in one arm with a baguette and leafy green celery tops poking out. She wears a vintage washed denim jacket with a shearling collar over a fitted black ribbed midi dress and beat-up white New Balance 550s with visible wear marks. Tortoiseshell cat-eye sunglasses sit on her face, and a thin gold chain necklace catches the light. Her light brown hair is air-dried and slightly wavy, tucked behind one ear. The bodega facade shows a faded red awning, stacked flower buckets in bright yellows and pinks, and hand-lettered specials on the window in white paint. The sidewalk is cracked concrete with a fire hydrant and a leashed French bulldog in the background waiting by a bike rack. Late afternoon sun hits the street at a low angle, casting warm light on one side of her face. Shot from across the narrow street with a slight upward angle, the casual composition captures authentic neighborhood energy—bodega run, shot on iPhone
presets.adUseReason: Everyday street-style UGC scene for fashion, beverage, and local brands.

presets.name: Fattoush Recipe Card
presets.prompt: Clean recipe infographic card on warm cream background. At the top, a decorative banner with the recipe title in bold serif lettering. Below the title, a horizontal row of small illustrated ingredient icons with labels and quantities (pita breads, romaine lettuce, tomatoes, cucumber, radishes, green onions, parsley, sumac, olive oil, lemon juice). In the middle section, 4 numbered cooking steps arranged in columns with small icons and short instruction text under each step. At the bottom, a large overhead photograph of the finished dish on a white plate. Warm earthy tones, olive green and brown accents, clean editorial layout.
presets.adUseReason: Recipe-card format for food, meal kits, restaurants, and grocery ads.

presets.name: Crystal Identification Field Card
presets.prompt: Photorealistic crystal identification infographic on a dark slate surface with dramatic low-angle lighting that makes each specimen glow and refract. Six raw mineral specimens arranged in a clean 2x3 grid, each sitting on a small museum-style acrylic riser. Row 1: Amethyst cluster with deep violet points and druzy base catching purple light, Clear Quartz terminated point with phantom inclusions and rainbow refractions visible inside, Citrine cathedral with warm honey-gold transparency and natural geometric terminations. Row 2: Black Tourmaline with striated prismatic columns and vitreous luster, Fluorite cube cluster showing cubic cleavage with green-to-purple color zoning under the surface, Pyrite cubes with mirror-bright metallic faces and sharp geometric perfection. Each crystal has a clean identification card extending to its right with: mineral name in bold geological sans-serif, chemical formula in italic (e.g. SiO₂, CaF₂, FeS₂), Mohs hardness shown as a filled progress bar out of 10, crystal system with a small wireframe geometric diagram (hexagonal, cubic, trigonal), primary geographic origin with a tiny map pin icon, streak color shown as an actual color swatch, luster type label (vitreous, metallic, waxy), and a one-line metaphysical property note in small italic. Title at top: "MINERAL IDENTIFICATION GUIDE" in wide-tracked lapidary-style uppercase with a small pickaxe icon. Bottom bar shows the full Mohs hardness scale from 1-10 with reference minerals (talc to diamond) as tiny specimen thumbnails. Rich museum-quality specimen photography with scientific field-guide overlay, dark dramatic lighting with selective crystal illumination.
presets.adUseReason: Catalog/spec-card infographic pattern for products with attributes.

presets.name: City Guide Map Illustration
presets.prompt: A stylized illustrated city guide infographic for Lisbon, Portugal. A simplified, colorful map of the Alfama district shows key landmarks as charming illustrated icons: a yellow tram, a pastel de nata bakery, a miradouro viewpoint, a fado music bar, and a tile shop. Walking routes connect the landmarks with dotted lines and estimated walking times. The map uses a warm color palette of terracotta, sky blue, mustard, and sage green on a cream background. Small info callouts give one-line tips ("Best pastéis: 8am before the line"). Title reads "LISBON IN A DAY — Alfama Walking Guide" in a hand-drawn serif font. The style is editorial illustration meets travel magazine — city guide infographic, illustrated map
presets.adUseReason: Travel/local business map creative for destination or neighborhood campaigns.

presets.name: Capsule Travel Wardrobe
presets.prompt: A flat-lay infographic of a capsule travel wardrobe for a 7-day trip, arranged in a perfect grid on a cream linen surface. Items include: 3 tops (white tee, striped Breton, black silk blouse), 2 bottoms (dark denim, tailored tan trousers), 1 dress (navy wrap midi), 1 outerwear (camel trench coat), and accessories (white sneakers, black sandals, a crossbody bag, sunglasses, a silk scarf). Each item has a small label with day combinations ("Day 1: top A + bottom B"). A color palette strip at the top shows the cohesive neutral tones. Clean typography reads "7 DAYS, 10 PIECES" — travel wardrobe infographic, packing guide flat-lay
presets.adUseReason: Fashion flat-lay system for bundle, capsule, or travel shopping ads.

presets.name: Denim Wash & Fade Guide
presets.prompt: Photorealistic denim wash guide infographic on a clean concrete floor with flat natural lighting. Six rectangular denim swatches arranged vertically from darkest at top to lightest at bottom, each swatch large enough to show the twill weave texture in sharp macro detail — individual warp and weft threads visible, selvedge edge with red ID line showing on one side. Swatch 1 — RAW / UNWASHED: deep midnight indigo, completely uniform with no fading, stiff crease visible, rope-dyed yarn with white core barely visible. Swatch 2 — ONE WASH: slightly softened deep blue with minimal shrinkage crinkles, first hint of texture. Swatch 3 — RINSED: medium dark blue with early whisker marks and honeycomb patterns beginning behind the knees, natural wear creases emerging. Swatch 4 — VINTAGE WASH: classic mid-blue with pronounced fading on thighs and seat, visible contrast between indigo valleys and white peaks of the twill, pocket rivets leaving patina marks. Swatch 5 — STONE WASH: light blue with soft hand-feel look, pumice abrasion visible as fuzzy surface texture, high-low contrast reduced, broken-in look. Swatch 6 — HEAVY DISTRESSED: pale ice blue with intentional rip repairs, exposed white weft threads, paint splatter and patch details, frayed edges. Next to each swatch: wash name in bold industrial sans-serif, fabric weight in oz (from 14.5oz raw to 11oz distressed), shrinkage percentage, recommended break-in period (6 months raw, 0 for pre-washed), care icons (soak vs machine vs dry clean), and a 3-photo fade progression strip showing the same spot at 0, 6, and 24 months of wear. Title at top: "THE DENIM GUIDE — WASH TO FADE" in rugged stencil-style uppercase. Bottom strip shows care tips: cold soak icon, inside-out icon, hang dry icon, and a freezer icon for raw denim freshening. Premium denim brand lookbook photography with technical garment-industry overlay.
presets.adUseReason: Material comparison guide for fashion education and product positioning.

presets.name: We Are Hiring — Photo Backdrop (Poster)
presets.prompt: Create a "WE ARE HIRING" recruitment social post for TreeTrimmers, a tree-removal company. Use the attached image as the exact company logo — place it cleanly and do not redraw, recolor, restyle, or retype it. Pull the whole design from the logo: match its palette of deep forest green and warm walnut brown on cream/off-white, and echo its bold slab-serif lettering for the headline type. Theme: authentic, safety-conscious arborist/tree-removal work (hard hats, harnesses, chainsaws, tall trees, wood chips), professional local-service-brand quality. Background: a full-bleed photographic tree-removal worksite under a dark green/brown overlay for legibility. Layout: dramatic recruitment-poster — oversized type with "WE ARE HIRING" as a commanding focal point over the photo, editorial vertical spacing, logo locked to a top corner, role/details/CTA arranged like a professional hiring poster. Logo treatment: full-color, clean, clearly visible (normal — not faded or watermarked). Headline "WE ARE HIRING"; role "Tree Climber & Crew Member"; sub-line "Experienced climbers & reliable groundsmen"; details "Full-time · Competitive weekly pay · Local crew"; CTA "Apply at TreeTrimmers.com". All text crisp, correctly spelled, and legible. No fake QR codes, no tiny legal text, no invented phone numbers or addresses.
presets.adUseReason: Recruiting post format with brand/logo constraints and clear CTA.

presets.name: Moving Company
presets.prompt:
A professional, high-converting vertical social media flyer for "Moving Marvelz", a family-owned movers & junk removal company serving Lake, McHenry & Cook County, IL, 9:16 portrait layout. Use the attached image of our the employees and incorporate it into the flyer.

Use the brand palette: deep red #AD3136 as the primary accent and dark navy #1A2B3A as the dark base (matching the attached LOGO).

TOP (~upper third): a dark-navy (#1A2B3A) header band with subtle geometric accents (halftone dots, thin diagonal lines) in deep red (#AD3136). Place the attached LOGO centered near the top, clean and clearly visible. Below it a thin red divider line, then a large, heavy, all-caps headline reading "SAME-DAY MOVING & JUNK REMOVAL" in white, with "SAME-DAY" highlighted in red (#AD3136). Beneath it a short supporting line "Local & long-distance moving, junk removal, and cleanouts — family owned."

MIDDLE (~center, largest area): the attached PHOTO of the moving crew / truck / a completed move, large, inside a softly rounded white-bordered frame with a subtle drop shadow, filling the width.

LOWER SECTION: a deep-red (#AD3136) "Call Now!" call-to-action block with a phone icon and the number "(224) 666-3691" in white, large and legible.

BOTTOM BAR: a slim dark-navy footer strip spanning the full width, with a small globe icon and "movingmarvelz.com" in white, plus a small badge reading "Family Owned • Est. 2023 • Serving Lake, McHenry & Cook County".

STYLE: modern, clean, bold sans-serif typography, high contrast, professional moving-company look, balanced for a tall 9:16 frame. Print-quality, crisp, perfectly legible text with correct spelling. No watermarks, no stock imagery, no extra logos
presets.adUseReason: Service-business flyer with offer, trust signals, and direct CTA.

presets.name: HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE
presets.prompt: Ultra-realistic minimalist studio product photography of a small transparent glass facial oil dropper bottle with a black rubber pipette cap, containing pale pink serum with dried pink floral elements suspended inside, placed centered on top of a natural raw wooden cube block with visible grain and split texture. To the left of the cube stands a tall matte white rectangular skincare box with minimal black typography reading “HUILE ÉCLAT VISAGE,” clean modern branding, and subtle logo near the bottom. To the right of the cube is a clear cylindrical glass vase filled with water and thin stems of dried pink gypsophila flowers extending upward and outward. The entire composition is arranged on a smooth matte pastel pink surface with a matching soft pink seamless studio background. Strong directional soft light comes from the left side, casting long, soft-edged realistic shadows of the flowers and objects onto the pink background. Lighting is natural-style, -det diffused, and warm, creating gentle highlights on the glass, subtle reflections on the serum bottle, and soft texture on the wooden block. Camera angle is straight-on at tabletop height, medium framing, all main objects in sharp focus with minimal depth of field blur. Color palette is dominated by blush pink, soft rose tones, warm light wood, clean white, and transparent glass. Mood is clean, airy, feminine, elegant, Scandinavian minimal aesthetic, premium skincare branding style, photorealistic, studio-grade realism, ultra
presets.adUseReason: Premium beauty product photography with benefits and ingredient story.

presets.name: SaaS Product Launch OG
presets.prompt: A bold Open Graph image for a SaaS product launch. Deep navy blue background with a subtle radial gradient lighter at center. A large 3D-rendered laptop mockup at slight angle displays a clean dashboard UI with charts and metrics. To the left, large white bold sans-serif text reads "Ship Faster. Scale Smarter." with a smaller subline "The all-in-one platform for modern teams" in a lighter weight. A bright coral accent stripe runs along the bottom edge. The composition is balanced — text on left third, product on right two-thirds. Clean, modern, tech-forward. No clutter — the message reads instantly at thumbnail size — SaaS launch OG image, social share card
presets.adUseReason: Software launch/landing-page share image for B2B campaigns.

presets.name: Product Comparison OG
presets.prompt: A clean, high-contrast Open Graph image for a product comparison or "vs" page. Pure white background with a sharp vertical dividing line down the center in light grey. Left half: a large, modern app icon with rounded corners in a cool blue gradient, with the product name "StreamFlow" in bold dark sans-serif below and three feature checkmarks in green with short labels (real-time sync, unlimited seats, API access) stacked neatly underneath. Right half: a similar app icon in a warm orange gradient with "Rival App" below, and three corresponding feature rows — two with green checkmarks and one with a red X mark. Dead center overlapping the dividing line: a bold circular badge with "VS" in thick white uppercase letters on a dark charcoal background with a subtle shadow. Top of the image: a clean headline "StreamFlow vs Rival App" in dark bold sans-serif with a subline "See how they compare" in lighter grey. The layout is symmetrical, scannable, and instantly communicates a comparison — no clutter, strong visual hierarchy. Designed to earn clicks from search results, social shares, and link previews — product comparison OG image, versus page card
presets.adUseReason: Direct comparison creative for conversion and competitor-positioning ads.

presets.name: Product Showcase with Bold Text Hook
presets.prompt: A 16:9 YouTube thumbnail composition featuring [PRODUCT/GADGET] prominently displayed in the center against a [BACKGROUND_COLOR/SETTING] background. The item should be well-lit and clearly visible with professional product photography style. Bold, eye-catching text overlay in [COLOR] positioned at the top or side reading '[TEXT_HOOK]' in a sans-serif font that contrasts sharply with the background. The design should be clean and uncluttered with minimal elements to maintain focus on the main product. Include subtle visual effects like a soft glow or shadow around the product to make it pop. The overall aesthetic should be modern, vibrant, and curiosity-driven to maximize click-through rate. Keep negative space balanced to avoid visual overwhelm while ensuring the product and text are the clear focal points.
presets.adUseReason: Thumbnail-style product hook for video ads and creator content.

thumbnailCaptureMethod: Chrome logged-in UI accessibility read of template card image AXURL attributes; direct CDN URLs decoded from Genviral Next image proxy URLs.
